languages.text: {n}Мертвое тело носителя подергивается в конвульсиях, однако существо не торопится его отпускать. На мясистом тельце паразита набухли странные наросты, напоминающие спелые плоды. Раньше вы их не замечали.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Мертвое тело носителя подергивается в конвульсиях, однако существо не торопится его отпускать. На мясистом тельце паразита набухли странные наросты, напоминающие спелые плоды. Раньше вы их не замечали.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The dead body of the host is twitching convulsively, but the creature does not seem to be in a hurry to let it go. The parasite's meaty body is covered with strange swollen growths that vaguely resemble succulent fruit. You haven't noticed them before.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Мертвое тело носителя подергивается в конвульсиях, однако существо не торопится его отпускать. На мясистом тельце паразита набухли странные наросты, напоминающие спелые плоды. Раньше вы их не замечали.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The dead body of the host is twitching convulsively, but the creature does not seem to be in a hurry to let it go. The parasite's meaty body is covered with strange swollen growths that vaguely resemble succulent fruit. You haven't noticed them before.{/n}

{n}The dead body of the host is twitching convulsively, but the creature does not seem to be in a hurry to let it go. The parasite's meaty body is covered with strange swollen growths that vaguely resemble succulent fruit. You haven't noticed them before.{/n}

{n}The dead body of the host is twitching convulsively, but the creature does not seem to be in a hurry to let it go. The parasite's meaty body is covered with strange swollen growths that vaguely resemble succulent fruit. You haven't noticed them before.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der tote Körper des Wirts zuckt krampfhaft, aber die Kreatur scheint es nicht eilig zu haben, ihn loszulassen. Der fleischige Körper des Parasiten ist mit seltsamen geschwollenen Wucherungen bedeckt, die vage an saftige Früchte erinnern. Du hast sie vorher nicht bemerkt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dead body of the host is twitching convulsively, but the creature does not seem to be in a hurry to let it go. The parasite's meaty body is covered with strange swollen growths that vaguely resemble succulent fruit. You haven't noticed them before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der tote Körper des Wirts zuckt krampfhaft, aber die Kreatur scheint es nicht eilig zu haben, ihn loszulassen. Der fleischige Körper des Parasiten ist mit seltsamen geschwollenen Wucherungen bedeckt, die vage an saftige Früchte erinnern. Du hast sie vorher nicht bemerkt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le cadavre de l'hôte est agité de convulsions, mais la créature ne semble pas pressée de s'en débarrasser. Le corps charnu du parasite est couvert d'étranges excroissances gonflées qui ressemblent vaguement à des fruits succulents. Vous ne les aviez pas remarquées auparavant.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dead body of the host is twitching convulsively, but the creature does not seem to be in a hurry to let it go. The parasite's meaty body is covered with strange swollen growths that vaguely resemble succulent fruit. You haven't noticed them before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le cadavre de l'hôte est agité de convulsions, mais la créature ne semble pas pressée de s'en débarrasser. Le corps charnu du parasite est couvert d'étranges excroissances gonflées qui ressemblent vaguement à des fruits succulents. Vous ne les aviez pas remarquées auparavant.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El cuerpo muerto del huésped se sacude convulsivamente, pero la criatura no parece tener prisa por soltarlo. El cuerpo carnoso del parásito está cubierto de extraños crecimientos hinchados que recuerdan vagamente a suculentas frutas. No te habías fijado en ellos antes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dead body of the host is twitching convulsively, but the creature does not seem to be in a hurry to let it go. The parasite's meaty body is covered with strange swollen growths that vaguely resemble succulent fruit. You haven't noticed them before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El cuerpo muerto del huésped se sacude convulsivamente, pero la criatura no parece tener prisa por soltarlo. El cuerpo carnoso del parásito está cubierto de extraños crecimientos hinchados que recuerdan vagamente a suculentas frutas. No te habías fijado en ellos antes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Konakçının ölü bedeni kasıla kasıla seğiriyor ama yaratık onu bırakmak için acele ediyor gibi görünmüyor. Parazitin etli vücudu, belli belirsiz etli meyvelere benzeyen garip şişliklerle kaplı. Bunları daha önce fark etmemiştiniz.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dead body of the host is twitching convulsively, but the creature does not seem to be in a hurry to let it go. The parasite's meaty body is covered with strange swollen growths that vaguely resemble succulent fruit. You haven't noticed them before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Konakçının ölü bedeni kasıla kasıla seğiriyor ama yaratık onu bırakmak için acele ediyor gibi görünmüyor. Parazitin etli vücudu, belli belirsiz etli meyvelere benzeyen garip şişliklerle kaplı. Bunları daha önce fark etmemiştiniz.{/n}
